LanguageData.AdvancedGravtech.description: Build advanced Hellion upgrades and support systems.
LanguageData.AdvancedGravtech.label: advanced Hellion systems
LanguageData.BasicGravtech.description: Rebuild the Hellion and use it to travel the planet. Without a mooring mast, launching the Hellion will abandon your current map.
LanguageData.BasicGravtech.label: Hellion airframe
LanguageData.StandardGravtech.description: Build more complex Hellion components and flight systems.
LanguageData.StandardGravtech.label: Hellion systems
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelRefining.description: Construct astrofuel synthesizers that automatically convert oil into astrofuel for Hellion use.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactWorkspaces.description: Unlock smaller variants of workbenches designed for the Hellion. Compact enough to fit into tight quarters without sacrificing essential functions.
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipLiving.description: Build Hellion-exclusive furniture such as bunk beds, lockers, and medbay beds to keep crew comfortable and functional during long voyages.
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipLiving.label: Hellion quarters
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipPower.description: Construct Hellion solar panelling, reactor-core power cells, and astrofuel generators to supply energy for Hellion systems.
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipPower.label: Hellion power
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipWeaponry.description: Construct Hellion artillery and point-defense turrets to fight hostile craft in orbit or provide bombardment from the sky.
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipWeaponry.label: Hellion weapon systems
LanguageData.VGE_HeatDissipation.description: Harvest structural heat generated during Hellion launches and dissipate it safely. Excess heat can be converted into usable power.
LanguageData.VGE_OxygenNetwork.description: Harvest and store oxygen for use on the Hellion. Unlocks construction of vacsuits and other survival gear needed to operate in vacuum.
